action.reasoning: Starting first iteration: need to build baseline GNN for ogbg-molpcba. Will follow recommended workflow: write model.py, train.py, predict.py, train with few epochs (3) and submit eval to measure iteration time and get baseline score. Model: GIN with edge features, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=3, global mean pooling, 128-task binary classification. Loss: BCEWithLogitsLoss masked by NaN. Evaluation: AP per task averaged across 128 tasks. Batch size: 256. Optimizer: Adam lr=1e-3. Data loading: custom dataset from .pt lists. Logging to metrics.jsonl.
